description: CompositionRed dress made of sheer, woven 100% polyester, sleeveless, has a shawl neck, removable fabric belt, full lining and is gathered at the hem to create a lightly puffed shapeFitRegularWash careRinse seperatelyGentle hand wash in mild detergentDo not bleachDo not scrub on embroidery and printLine dry inside outIron lowIt’s time to explore and discover new styles and get ready for freshness and summer outdoors with sepia. Stylish, girly and summery, this dress is a must-have in your new season wardrobe. Pair this dress with stilletto sandals and long earrings.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
